title: stelis excelsa
intro: Stelis excelsa, also known as the orchid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its high concentration of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Stelis excelsa include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
